title: Printer Section
description: Schema for the printer section used in group_vars overlay files. Supports the newer nested model and a legacy flat model during migration.
$comment: Cross-field membership check for printer.default_printer against dynamic no_ppd/with_ppd keys is enforced by scripts/validate-group-vars.py.

oneOf.title: Nested Printer Model
oneOf.description: Preferred printer model with feature flags and named printer profiles.

princh.description: Collection of princh-integrated printers keyed by a logical printer ID.

propertyNames.description: Logical printer ID using lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.

default_printer.description: Logical ID of the default printer profile that should be selected by the client.

no_ppd.description: Collection of printer profiles that do not require a PPD file. Keys are logical printer IDs.

propertyNames.description: Logical printer ID using lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.

with_ppd.description: Collection of printer profiles that require a PPD file. Keys are logical printer IDs.

propertyNames.description: Logical printer ID using lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.

oneOf.title: Flat Printer Model
oneOf.description: Legacy printer model kept for backward compatibility.

name.description: Human-readable printer name shown or used by the target system.

ip.description: IPv4 address of the printer that the client should use.

display_name.description: Human-readable printer name shown in Princh-related UX.
Human-readable printer name shown to users or used by the target system.

description.description: Optional longer description of where the printer is located or how it is used.

ip.description: IPv4 address of the printer that the client should use.

protocol.description: Optional transport protocol used to reach the printer, for example ipp or socket.

printer_settings.description: Optional default print settings for a printer profile.

page_size.description: Default page size to use when printing, for example A4.

color_mode.description: Default color mode, for example rgb or grayscale.

duplex.description: Default duplex mode, for example none or duplex_tumble.

orientation.description: Default print orientation, for example portrait or landscape.

printer_profile_with_ppd.description: Printer profile that requires a PPD file.

display_name.description: Human-readable printer name shown to users or used by the target system.

description.description: Optional longer description of where the printer is located or how it is used.

ip.description: IPv4 address of the printer that the client should use.

protocol.description: Optional transport protocol used to reach the printer, for example ipp or socket.

ppd_file.description: Typed asset reference to a PPD file copied from config/assets into the image.

path.description: Relative path under config/assets. For backward compatibility, values prefixed with assets/ are also accepted.
